assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Automatic force-upgrade to 1.31 (next supported minor version)' for Regular channel clusters with details about control plane and node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'NO automatic force-upgrade at 1.30 EoS' and 'Remains at 1.30 until end of extended support (up to 24 months total)' for Extended channel clusters

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: States 'Control plane: Force-upgraded to 1.31 at EoS' and 'Node pools: Force-upgraded even if auto-upgrade is disabled per-nodepool' for No channel clusters

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Provides specific command example for maintenance exclusion with 'no_upgrades' scope and mentions '30 days max' limitation multiple times

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Provides multiple proactive options including manual upgrade commands and states 'Manual upgrade ahead of EoS (for control)' and includes comprehensive pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Includes Cloud Logging query example and mentions 'Enable scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance warning)' in the monitoring section

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Only mentions checking deprecated API usage with kubectl metrics command, but does not specifically mention the deprecation insights dashboard as a planning tool

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: While the response recommends upgrades and mentions security patches, it does not explicitly warn against 'snowflaking' or manually freezing versions, nor does it mention the security and reliability risks of this practice
